description.ko: 정교하게 가공된 크리스탈을 통과하는 순백의 빛이 선명한 무지개로 변하는 순간을 포착하여, 투명함과 색채 사이의 섬세한 균형을 광학적으로 탐구한 작품입니다.
description.en: An artistic exploration of optics, capturing the moment pure white light transforms into a vivid rainbow as it passes through a precision-cut crystal, illustrating the delicate balance between transparency and color.

prompt: A high-end macro shot of a complex geometric glass prism refracting a single beam of intense white light into a brilliant, wide spectrum. Visible light paths through the glass, soft caustic patterns on a clean matte surface, ethereal atmosphere, 8k resolution, ray-tracing, photorealistic, chromatic aberration, vibrant rainbow colors.
